title: Vi har förväxlat krångel med kompetens
summary: gingerBill har publicerat en bloggpost med den rubriken ”Good Tools Are Invisible”. Tesen är enkel och obekväm: ett bra verktyg ska vara osynligt. title: QuadRF can spot drones and see WiFi through my wall
summary: The QuadRF (pictured above) a phased-array radio built around a Raspberry Pi 5 and an FPGA board with picosecond-level timing. It does advanced signal processing and beamforming. title: Study: ”Mommy, do you love your phone more than me?”
summary: Abstract While there is robust literature on the negative impact of adolescent device use on physical and psychological health, there is less research on the use of technology in the presence of others and its implications for key relationships.
